metadata.source: CDC 2025/2026 Lone Star + Ixodes pacificus surveillance (multiple releases) + NEON + state reports (Missouri, Arkansas, etc.) via cdc_direct_downloads_2026 series. Major 2025 expansion.
metadata.notes: Updated using latest 2025 Lone Star data (near-complete establishment in many states, especially Missouri) + Western I. pacificus data. Purple blob now significantly larger/intenser in recent years. See cdc_direct_downloads_2026-05-*.json files for full source list.
